input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.9.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.9.1.2
            TITLE: course width will be minimum 4.9 m wide as measured between the inner edges of the bases

            CONTENT:
            rule D.9.1.2: Course width will be minimum 4.9 m wide as measured between the inner edges of the bases
D.9.1.2 Course width will be minimum 4.9 m wide as measured between the inner edges of the bases 
of the course edge cones

final_answer: Course width will be minimum 4.9 m wide as measured between the inner edges of the bases of the course edge cones
